artifact_contract.engineer_prompt: Save the engineering review and rewrite notes under engineer-prompt/.
artifact_contract.inputs: Keep stable prompt snapshots and any reused dataset references under inputs/.
artifact_contract.iterations: Write research, synthesis, optimize, election, benchmark, and validation outputs under iteration-N/.
artifact_contract.decision: Summarize the winning prompt decision and validation outcome in decision.md.

notes: Run /engineer-prompt first, then @trainer. Keep repo-specific optimization artifacts in .trainer-workspace instead of a generic copied eval layout.
